author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Root cause: im2col iterates in (channel, kh, kw, oh, ow) order — the input reads jump by width between consecutive oh values, causing L1/L2 cache misses. The output writes are sequential, but reads dominate cost for large feature maps.

Fix: reorder to (batch, oh, ow, c, kh, kw) for spatial-major input access. Also eliminate the per-element padding branch with a fast path for the common non-padded interior region.
